---
title: "Ann Blage"
---

## Ann Blage

**Dates:** (b.Marden, Kent 1835/6)

### Description

housemaid at Hursley Vicarage during the 1861 census.

### Biography

The name looks like Blage in the census return, but it may be a mistake because this person is hard to identify in any other record.

### Letters

- Letter from Holy Innocents [28? December], 1865.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
